# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [Confirmed: Police Intercept Ammunition in Garissa-Nairobi Bus](https://zandani.co.ke/article/police-intercept-ammunition-bus) - DCI officers at Kanyonyoo have intercepted a bus carrying live ammunition and GSU uniforms to Nairobi, preventing a security threat. Get the details.
- [Kangemi Slip Road Cracks Exposed: Residents Raise Alarm](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kangemi-slip-road-cracks) - Kangemi slip road cracks along Waiyaki Way spark safety fears among residents. Shifting concrete blocks suggest deep structural issues. Get the details.
- [How Rigathi Gachagua 2027 Strategy Will Unseat President Ruto](https://zandani.co.ke/article/rigathi-gachagua-2027-unseat-ruto) - Rigathi Gachagua 2027 strategy focuses on opposition unity to challenge President Ruto. This move impacts Kenyan political landscape. Read the full story.
- [Oscar Sudi Attacks Uhuru Kenyatta Over His Health And Tells Him To Retire And Wait For Death](https://zandani.co.ke/article/oscar-sudi-attacks-uhuru-kenyatta-over-his-health-and-tells-him-to-r) - Kapseret MP Oscar Sudi urges former President Uhuru Kenyatta to retire from active politics and focus on his health as political tension rises in Kenya.

- [Title Race Chaos: Celtic Denied by Controversial 'Handball' Goal as Iheanacho and Tierney Return](https://zandani.co.ke/article/title-race-chaos-celtic-denied-by-controversial-handball-goal-as-ihe) - Celtic denied by a controversial handball in title race chaos. Kelechi Iheanacho and Kieran Tierney return in a dramatic turn for the Hoops.
- [Kirinyaga Church Robbery: How Three Sanctuaries Lost Ksh1 Million](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kirinyaga-church-robbery-theft) - Thieves in a Kirinyaga church robbery stole property worth over Ksh 1 million from three local sanctuaries on Saturday night. Read the full story here.
- [Confirmed: Machakos Riparian Land Demolitions Target Mavoko](https://zandani.co.ke/article/machakos-riparian-land-demolitions) - Machakos County orders riparian land demolitions in Mavoko to prevent flooding. Residents in 360 Estate face major losses. Read the full story now.
